excluded: a claim that PhaseWrap-RoPE replaces RoPE
a claim that longer training alone establishes learned retrieval generalization
supported: A no-credential long-training support-complete two-block decoder capacity audit.
A learned vocab-softmax check with no fixed copy output, no lookup output, and no fallback cue decoder.

decision.claim_boundary: Longer training improves the support-complete two-block decoder but still does not establish capacity for promotion.

model.support_policy: phase-cued train split covers all reference-delta residues when examples_per_length is 6
model.trained_parameters: token embeddings, two q/k/v/o attention blocks, vocab output projection, positional scale
model.value_output_mode: learned vocab softmax, no fixed copy output
